tools.name: accounts.analyticsadminAccountsList
tools.description: Returns all accounts accessible by the caller. Note that these accounts might not currently have GA4 properties. Soft-deleted (ie: "trashed") accounts are excluded by default. Returns an empty list if no relevant accounts are found.

tools.name: accounts.analyticsadminAccountsProvisionAccountTicket
tools.description: Requests a ticket for creating an account.

tools.name: accounts.analyticsadminAccountsSearchChangeHistoryEvents
tools.description: Searches through all changes to an account or its children given the specified set of filters.

tools.name: accountSummaries.analyticsadminAccountSummariesList
tools.description: Returns summaries of all accounts accessible by the caller.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsBatchCreate
tools.description: Creates information about multiple access bindings to an account or property. This method is transactional. If any AccessBinding cannot be created, none of the AccessBindings will be created.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsBatchDelete
tools.description: Deletes information about multiple users' links to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsBatchGet
tools.description: Gets information about multiple access bindings to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsBatchUpdate
tools.description: Updates information about multiple access bindings to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsCreate
tools.description: Creates an access binding on an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAccessBindingsList
tools.description: Lists all access bindings on an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAcknowledgeUserDataCollection
tools.description: Acknowledges the terms of user data collection for the specified property. This acknowledgement must be completed (either in the Google Analytics UI or through this API) before MeasurementProtocolSecret resources may be created.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAudiencesCreate
tools.description: Creates an Audience.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesAudiencesList
tools.description: Lists Audiences on a property. Audiences created before 2020 may not be supported. Default audiences will not show filter definitions.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesBigQueryLinksList
tools.description: Lists BigQuery Links on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesChannelGroupsCreate
tools.description: Creates a ChannelGroup.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesChannelGroupsList
tools.description: Lists ChannelGroups on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesConversionEventsCreate
tools.description: Creates a conversion event with the specified attributes.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesConversionEventsList
tools.description: Returns a list of conversion events in the specified parent property. Returns an empty list if no conversion events are found.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCreate
tools.description: Creates an "GA4" property with the specified location and attributes.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCreateConnectedSiteTag
tools.description: Creates a connected site tag for a Universal Analytics property. You can create a maximum of 20 connected site tags per property. Note: This API cannot be used on GA4 properties.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCustomDimensionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a CustomDimension.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCustomDimensionsList
tools.description: Lists CustomDimensions on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCustomMetricsArchive
tools.description: Archives a CustomMetric on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCustomMetricsCreate
tools.description: Creates a CustomMetric.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesCustomMetricsList
tools.description: Lists CustomMetrics on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDataStreamsCreate
tools.description: Creates a DataStream.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDataStreamsList
tools.description: Lists DataStreams on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDataStreamsMeasurementProtocolSecretsCreate
tools.description: Creates a measurement protocol secret.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDataStreamsMeasurementProtocolSecretsList
tools.description: Returns child MeasurementProtocolSecrets under the specified parent Property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDeleteConnectedSiteTag
tools.description: Deletes a connected site tag for a Universal Analytics property. Note: this has no effect on GA4 properties.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposalsApprove
tools.description: Approves a DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposal. The DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposal will be deleted and a new DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLink will be created.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposalsCancel
tools.description: Cancels a DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposal. Cancelling can mean either: - Declining a proposal initiated from Display & Video 360 - Withdrawing a proposal initiated from Google Analytics After being cancelled, a proposal will eventually be deleted automatically.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposalsCreate
tools.description: Creates a DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposal.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposalsList
tools.description: Lists DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinkProposals on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLink. This can only be utilized by users who have proper authorization both on the Google Analytics property and on the Display & Video 360 advertiser. Users who do not have access to the Display & Video 360 advertiser should instead seek to create a DisplayVideo360LinkProposal.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesDisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinksList
tools.description: Lists all DisplayVideo360AdvertiserLinks on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesExpandedDataSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates a ExpandedDataSet.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesExpandedDataSetsList
tools.description: Lists ExpandedDataSets on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesFetchAutomatedGa4ConfigurationOptOut
tools.description: Fetches the opt out status for the automated GA4 setup process for a UA property. Note: this has no effect on GA4 property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesFetchConnectedGa4Property
tools.description: Given a specified UA property, looks up the GA4 property connected to it. Note: this cannot be used with GA4 properties.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesFirebaseLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a FirebaseLink. Properties can have at most one FirebaseLink.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesFirebaseLinksList
tools.description: Lists FirebaseLinks on a property. Properties can have at most one FirebaseLink.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesGoogleAdsLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a GoogleAdsLink.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesGoogleAdsLinksList
tools.description: Lists GoogleAdsLinks on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesList
tools.description: Returns child Properties under the specified parent Account. Only "GA4" properties will be returned. Properties will be excluded if the caller does not have access. Soft-deleted (ie: "trashed") properties are excluded by default. Returns an empty list if no relevant properties are found.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesListConnectedSiteTags
tools.description: Lists the connected site tags for a Universal Analytics property. A maximum of 20 connected site tags will be returned. Note: this has no effect on GA4 property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesRunAccessReport
tools.description: Returns a customized report of data access records. The report provides records of each time a user reads Google Analytics reporting data. Access records are retained for up to 2 years. Data Access Reports can be requested for a property. The property must be in Google Analytics 360. This method is only available to Administrators. These data access records include GA4 UI Reporting, GA4 UI Explorations, GA4 Data API, and other products like Firebase & Admob that can retrieve data from Google Analytics through a linkage. These records don't include property configuration changes like adding a stream or changing a property's time zone. For configuration change history, see [searchChangeHistoryEvents](https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/config/admin/v1/rest/v1alpha/accounts/searchChangeHistoryEvents).

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesSearchAds360LinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a SearchAds360Link.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesSearchAds360LinksList
tools.description: Lists all SearchAds360Links on a property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesSetAutomatedGa4ConfigurationOptOut
tools.description: Sets the opt out status for the automated GA4 setup process for a UA property. Note: this has no effect on GA4 property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksAudit
tools.description: Lists all user links on an account or property, including implicit ones that come from effective permissions granted by groups or organization admin roles. If a returned user link does not have direct permissions, they cannot be removed from the account or property directly with the DeleteUserLink command. They have to be removed from the group/etc that gives them permissions, which is currently only usable/discoverable in the GA or GMP UIs.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksBatchCreate
tools.description: Creates information about multiple users' links to an account or property. This method is transactional. If any UserLink cannot be created, none of the UserLinks will be created.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksBatchDelete
tools.description: Deletes information about multiple users' links to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksBatchGet
tools.description: Gets information about multiple users' links to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksBatchUpdate
tools.description: Updates information about multiple users' links to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a user link on an account or property. If the user with the specified email already has permissions on the account or property, then the user's existing permissions will be unioned with the permissions specified in the new UserLink.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksDelete
tools.description: Deletes a user link on an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksGet
tools.description: Gets information about a user's link to an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksList
tools.description: Lists all user links on an account or property.

tools.name: properties.analyticsadminPropertiesUserLinksPatch
tools.description: Updates a user link on an account or property.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
